
create Hashmap start

    make buckets(vector(vector(integer)));
    make alpha(real(30));
    make SIZE(integer);

finish

job InitiateHashmap() (Hashmap) start
    make result(Hashmap);
    make it(integer) = 0;
    loop(lt(it, 4)) start
        make curr(vector(integer));
        append(get(result, buckets), curr);
        it = add(it, 1);
    finish
    get(result, alpha) = 0.0;
    get(result, SIZE) = 0;
    return result;
finish

job Size(make map(Hashmap)) (integer) start
    return get(map, SIZE);
finish

job Insert(make map(Hashmap), make key(integer), make val(integer)) start

finish

job Exists(make map(Hashmap), make key(integer)) (bool) start

finish

job GetValue(make map(Hashmap), make key(integer)) (integer) start

finish
